hand artistry, much like an oil painting.

Title: Lessons in Breathing Coordination - Three 60 Minute Lessons
EffTicketTitle: Lessons in Breathing Coordination - Three 60 Minute Lessons
EffCatalogDescription: Breath is fundamental to every aspect of our life.  We are born with an ability to breathe deeply and fully, but as we go through life, stress and tension can cause our breathing to become shallow and constricted and our voices strained and weak.  Inefficient breathing can lead to fatigue, anxiety, muscular tension and even digestive problems,  Gettig back to the way nature designed us to breathe is a tonic that revitalizes body and mind.  In her lessons with you, Jean McClelland will integrate the Alexander Technique and the breathing coordination work of Carl Stough to help you reestablish your natural, coordinated way of breathing to strengthen your body, breath and voice.

Title: Confidential Consultation with Bennett Pologe, Ph.D.
EffTicketTitle: Confidential Consultation with Bennett Pologe, Ph.D.
EffCatalogDescription: One (1) hour confidential consultation with Dr. Bennett Pologe to take place over Zoom or in his NYC office at 330 W. 58th Street, NYC, and receive a copy of his book, "Stop Lying:  Getting Un-Lost and Un-Stuck in Your Life".
